channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Key Updates: Falta Repoll Withdrawal, SC Upholds Stray Dog Orders, Rupee Hits Record Low
item.description: In West Bengal’s Falta constituency, the Trinamool Congress (TMC) candidate, Jahangir Khan, has announced his withdrawal from the upcoming repoll scheduled for May 21, citing the constituency’s develo...

item.title: Tanzania Hosts TIMUN Conference to Highlight Youth Leadership in Global Development
item.description: Tanzania recently hosted the TIMUN Conference, where leaders strongly insisted on the central role of young people in driving positive changes across the world. The event brought together various part...

item.title: Church Leaders Encourage Prayer and Legal Action Amid Political Turmoil
item.description: Church leaders in the Philippines are urging the public to respond thoughtfully to the current political tensions in the country. Cebu Archbishop Alberts S. Uy emphasized the need for honesty, transpa...

item.title: UK Government Proposes Voluntary Cap on Key Grocery Prices Amid Rising Costs
item.description: The UK government is reportedly urging supermarkets to voluntarily limit price increases on essential groceries such as eggs, bread, and milk. In return, retailers could benefit from relaxed packaging...

item.title: DCI Issues Strong Warning to Protest Organisers Amid Ongoing Nationwide Fuel Strike in Kenya
item.description: The Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) has issued a stern warning to individuals organising, financing or participating in any criminal acts during the ongoing nationwide fuel protests in Ke...

item.title: Tanzania invests in advanced science and technology skills for Vision 2050
item.description: For long time, Tanzania struggle with lack of highly skilled scientists and tech experts, which slowed development plans. Now, government is taking big steps through programs like Samia Scholarship Ex...

item.title: PDP under Turaki waives screening requirement for Jonathan ahead of 2027 primaries
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP), under the leadership of Kabiru Turaki, don announce say dem go waive all screening requirements for former President Goodluck Jonathan as e dey prepare for the part...

item.title: The King and Queen visit Belfast with enhanced security measures
item.description: The King and Queen have arrived in Belfast, greeted by a significant security presence. Their visit is part of an official engagement, reflecting ongoing diplomatic and cultural ties. Authorities impl...

item.title: April Inflation Rises to 2.8% Driven by Higher Gas Prices
item.description: Statistics Canada reports that consumer inflation in Canada increased to 2.8 per cent in April 2026, up from 2.4 per cent in March compared to the same period last year. The primary factor behind this...

item.title: Why Emotional Stability and Open-mindedness Matter in Choosing a Life Partner
item.description: In today’s dating scene, many men get distracted by physical beauty and overlook critical qualities in a partner. According to the article by Benjamin Zulu, the most important traits a man should prio...

item.title: A Look Back at Joey Ramone's Early Years and the Rise of the Ramones
item.description: Joey Ramone, born Jeffrey Ross Hyman on May 19, 1951, was the iconic frontman of the pioneering punk rock band, the Ramones. Before forming the band in 1974 in Queens, New York, Joey played in a glam-...

item.title: Trump Endorses Ken Paxton Over John Cornyn, Sparking GOP Frustration and Concerns About Senate Race
item.description: Senate Republicans reacted strongly after former President Donald Trump unexpectedly endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton over incumbent Senator John Cornyn. The endorsement has alarmed GOP sena...

item.title: Madurai District to Conduct Census 2027 in August with Digital Enumeration
item.description: The first phase of Census 2027 in Madurai will be conducted from 1st to 30th August, as announced by District Collector K J Praveen Kumar. This is the eighth census since India’s Independence and the ...

item.title: Ghaziabad Incident: Rape Accused Welcomed by Supporters After Bail, Opposition Criticises State Government
item.description: In a disturbing incident from Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, a man accused of rape received a celebratory welcome from his supporters after being granted bail. Video footage from the area shows the accused...

item.title: Lara confronts Jalil for disobedience in Episode 32 of Blood vs Duty
item.description: In Episode 32 of the popular Filipino TV series 'Blood vs Duty,' tensions rise as Lara confronts Jalil for not following her instructions properly. The episode delves into the complexities of loyalty,...

item.title: Arusha High Court Sentences Former Security Guard to Death for Murder of Oscar Patrice in Karatu
item.description: The Arusha High Court has sentenced former security guard Mr Jacob Ndoole to death by hanging after finding him guilty of murdering Oscar Patrice at Agobafra Guest House in Karatu District, Arusha Reg...

item.title: Trump's Visible Hand Bruising Noted at White House Health Care Affordability Event
item.description: During a White House event focused on health care affordability on May 18, 2026, President Donald Trump appeared alongside officials including CMS Administrator Mehmet Oz, Health Secretary Robert F. K...

item.title: Bishop Kukah Reveals How Gowon’s Abuja Land Was Revoked and Later Restored
item.description: For inside Abuja recently, Bishop Matthew Hassan Kukah yan about how former FCT Minister, Nasir El-Rufai, remove plot of land wey belong to ex-Head of State, Yakubu Gowon. According to the Bishop, Gow...

item.title: Local Foods to Support Your Immune System During Winter
item.description: With cold fronts and heavy rains making South African winters harsher each year, staying healthy indoors has become increasingly important. According to the National Institute for Communicable Disease...

item.title: Rio Ferdinand visits Tanzania to promote football and tourism
item.description: Former England football star Rio Ferdinand was warmly welcomed on his first visit to Tanzania, arriving at Julius Nyerere International Airport on Tuesday. The reception included traditional dances, c...
